hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; npm run lint >&2 && npm run typecheck >&2 && npm run test:ts >&2 && mkdir -p firmware/build && make -C firmware test >&2 && npm run codegen:check >&2 || printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Local CI checks failed — fix errors before committing."}'; }
